character_dossiers.name: Mr. Blandly
character_dossiers.biography: One of the squire's friends who came to wish him a good voyage.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who led the chorus of a song during the ship's departure.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: The ship's captain who ordered Mr. Arrow below and confirmed his disappearance.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Arrow
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who became drunk and disappeared overboard.

character_dossiers.name: Job Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: The boatswain who served as a de facto mate.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member with sea experience who took watch duties.

character_dossiers.name: Israel Hands
character_dossiers.biography: The coxswain, an experienced seaman and confidant of Long John.

character_dossiers.name: Barbecue
character_dossiers.biography: The ship's cook who used a crutch and had a parrot named Cap'n Flint.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: The first-person narrator of the account.
